name: "Bug Fix PR"

title: "[Bugfix] <title>"
labels: [bug]
assignees: []

## Description

Please describe the bug and how you fixed it.

## Related Issue

Link to any related issues.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Hotfix

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my fix works
- [ ] I have added necessary documentation (if appropriate)
- [ ] No warnings or errors from linting

## Additional Notes

Add any other context or screenshots here.
